name: Ginger-Garlic Shrimp, China Royal
recipeIngredient: 1 Piece Ginger (1-inch long, peeled and minced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the ginger and mince it.
2. Trim and slice the green onions.
3. Split the shrimp down their backs with a sharp knife; do not remove the shell or vein.
4. Heat oil in a wok or wide skillet until it shimmers.
5. Add the shrimp to the hot oil and stir-fry for 2 minutes, then drain well.
6. Return half of the oil to the wok.
7. Add the shrimp, ginger, garlic, and onions; stir-fry for 20 seconds.
8. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper; stir-fry another 20 seconds.
9. Serve immediately.
